name: Thumb Print Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until fluffy.
2. Add the egg yolks, vanilla, and salt, and beat well.
3. Gradually add the flour, mixing well.
4. Shape into 3/4-inch balls.
5. Dip each ball in egg whites and roll in nuts.
6. Place the cookies about 1 inch apart on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Press down the center of each cookie with your thumb.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 17 minutes.
9. Cool slightly, then remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
10. Before serving, fill the centers of the cookies with your favorite jam.
